item.title: Comprehensive Plan Office Hours- Magnolia Public Library
item.description:
Thursday, March 26, 2026 at 5 PM

Location: Magnolia Public Library\, 2801 34th Ave W\, Seattle\, WA\, 98199\, United States

From the Office of Councilman Kettle: \nRight now\, the Office of Planning and Community Development is putting together four specific subarea plans: the Downtown Regional Plan\, the Northgate plan\, and two Manufacturing-Industrial Center plans. All of these plans are intended to come to Council to be voted on in late summer-early fall\, and you can sign up here for OPCD updates. \nIn the meantime\, my office will be hosting several Comprehensive Plan-specific office hours in March and April. \nThese office hours will follow our standard rules: sign in\, each speaker / group gets 10-15 minutes (depending on how many people have signed up)\, and will be first come\, first serve. \nYou can use my Instagram or Facebook to track updates.

From Discover Magnolia

Event details

item.title: Interbay Summer Camps- The Little Gym
item.description:
Wednesday, April 1, 2026 at 12 AM

Location: The Little Gym- Interbay\, 2213 15th Ave W\, Seattle\, WA\, 98119\, United States

Interbay summer camps are 3 hours of Serious Fun for kiddos 3-10 years of age! Camp consists of 2 hours of gym time\, and 1 hour of snacks and craft time. Every week brings a new and exciting theme for your camper and we always have blocks\, books and coloring pages on standby for those campers that need a break. Camps are held Monday-Wednesday from 1-4pm. We offer special discounted pricing for members and camp pack purchases. Non member pricing is $75 for a single camp pass. More information on pack pricing can be found via our scannable QR code. Priority registration opens February 1st.

From Discover Magnolia

Event details

item.title: Easter Celebration
item.description:
Sunday, April 5, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Magnolia United Church of Christ\, 3555 W McGraw St\, Seattle\, WA\, 98199\, United States

Please plan to join MUCC on Sunday\, April 5th as we celebrate Easter. This will be a joyous celebration with plenty of music and gift bags for the kids and ending with a rousing rendition of the Hallelujah Chorus! The MUCC Children’s Gathering Space will also be open on this Sunday from 9:30 to 11:30 for all kiddos ages 0-5 of families who are attending Worship Services. After Worship\, all of the young and young at heart are invited to the Easter Egg hunt outside and all are invited up to Pilgrim Hall for Fellowship with Mimosas and Hot Cross buns. Invite your family\, friends\, and neighbors to this joyous celebration of hope!

From Discover Magnolia

Event details

item.title: Meet Up Magnolia- virtual networking
item.description:
Thursday, April 9, 2026 at 9:30 AM

Location: https://us02web.zoom.us/j/85388228818?pwd=amdmUEMvcVo2YjhETkxkbGJCa1Q4Zz09

Our member businesses know the value of networking. Join us for our virtual networking event\, Meet Up Magnolia\, on the  2nd Thursday of every month. \nHow does this virtual networking work? You simply log on to the Zoom link and will be paired into one-on-one chats for 8 to 10 minutes each. We will repeat the process for approximately 3 or 4 rounds. You even have the option to follow up after the meeting and send a message to one or more of the people you meet to keep the dialogue going. \nSo many people to meet\, so many professional relationships to build. Join us HERE.

From Discover Magnolia

Event details

item.title: Magnolia Flea Market
item.description:
Saturday, April 11, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Magnolia Flea Market\, 4257 24th Ave W\, Seattle\, WA\, 98199\, United States

Discover a curated mix of vintage finds\, local makers\, handmade goods\, sweet treats\, coffee\, and food—plus a vintage warehouse full of gems to explore. \nWhether you’re hunting for one-of-a-kind pieces or just enjoying the Magnolia neighborhood\, this is your weekend spot. Bring a friend\, bring your pup\, and come hang out.

From Discover Magnolia

Event details

item.title: Just Shred It!
item.description:
Saturday, April 25, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Key Bank\, 2401 34th Ave W\, Seattle\, WA\, 98199\, United States

April 25\, 2026; Just Shred IT! 10 AM to 1 PM\, KeyBank parking lot\, W. McGraw St and 34th Ave W. \nEnter off W. McGraw St.     All Residences and Businesses are invited to bring their important papers \nto be commercially shredded. Save time and effort while gaining peace of mind that your important papers and information are disposed of in a safe and professional manner.  Old tax records\, old files\, save time and effort.  A $10 donation per box/bag is suggested.  Donations benefit our 501 (c) (3) Rotary Club of Magnolia Charitable Foundation.  We will provide you a tax receipt. First come first served. \nQuestions\, please contact Bryce McWalter\, 206-283-2037 or info@magnoliarotary.org.

From Discover Magnolia

Event details

item.title: Vino in the Village- April 25th 2026
item.description:
Saturday, April 25, 2026 at 5:30 PM

Location: Modeles Home Furnishings\, 3220 W McGraw St\, Seattle\, WA\, 98199\, United States

Vino in the Village Saturday\, April 25\, 2026 5:30 to 8:30 pm Magnolia Village Vino in the Village features 18 wineries offering delicious wines for tasting and purchase. And if you purchase two or more bottles from any winery\, you get a $5 discount in addition to being tax-free! Online Orders will end at Noon April 25th; Walk-up orders start at 5:30 pm at Modeles Home Furnishing. Advance tickets are $40\, Walk up price is $50

From Discover Magnolia

Event details

item.title: Parents Night Out
item.description:
Saturday, April 25, 2026 at 5:30 PM

Location: Bilingual Beginnings\, 3320 W McGraw St\, Seattle\, WA\, 98199\, United States

Bilingual Beginnings Preschool is hosting Parents Night Out during Vino in the Village. While you enjoy the event\, your child will have a fun evening with Spanish-themed activities\, arts & crafts\, and games. Dinner and snacks are included.

From Discover Magnolia

Event details

item.title: Interbay Summer Camps- The Little Gym
item.description:
Friday, May 1, 2026 at 12 AM

Location: The Little Gym- Interbay\, 2213 15th Ave W\, Seattle\, WA\, 98119\, United States

Interbay summer camps are 3 hours of Serious Fun for kiddos 3-10 years of age! Camp consists of 2 hours of gym time\, and 1 hour of snacks and craft time. Every week brings a new and exciting theme for your camper and we always have blocks\, books and coloring pages on standby for those campers that need a break. Camps are held Monday-Wednesday from 1-4pm. We offer special discounted pricing for members and camp pack purchases. Non member pricing is $75 for a single camp pass. More information on pack pricing can be found via our scannable QR code. Priority registration opens February 1st.

From Discover Magnolia

Event details

item.title: Pet First Aid
item.description:
Saturday, May 2, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Metro Dog\, 4020 23rd Ave W\, Seattle\, WA\, 98119\, United States

Join us for a day of the most comprehensive pet first aid course available! Our Walks ‘n’ Wags certified instructors offer a day of fun and learning. Classes are intended for pet care professionals\, dog and cat owners\, rescue workers\, first responders\, groomers and shelter workers. Course completion offers continuing education credits for PSI\, IAABC\, IACP and CBCC-KA members. This class has received the Animal Wellness Magazine Stamp of Approval and a Modern Dog Fave Find. We work with live animals in class.

From Discover Magnolia

Event details

item.title: Pet First Aid
item.description:
Sunday, May 3, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Metro Dog\, 4020 23rd Ave W\, Seattle\, WA\, 98119\, United States

Join us for a day of the most comprehensive pet first aid course available! Our Walks ‘n’ Wags certified instructors offer a day of fun and learning. Classes are intended for pet care professionals\, dog and cat owners\, rescue workers\, first responders\, groomers and shelter workers. Course completion offers continuing education credits for PSI\, IAABC\, IACP and CBCC-KA members. This class has received the Animal Wellness Magazine Stamp of Approval and a Modern Dog Fave Find. We work with live animals in class.

From Discover Magnolia

Event details

item.description:
Saturday, May 9, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Magnolia Flea Market\, 4257 24th Ave W\, Seattle\, WA\, 98199\, United States

Discover a curated mix of vintage finds\, local makers\, handmade goods\, sweet treats\, coffee\, and food—plus a vintage warehouse full of gems to explore. \nWhether you’re hunting for one-of-a-kind pieces or just enjoying the Magnolia neighborhood\, this is your weekend spot. Bring a friend\, bring your pup\, and come hang out.

item.title: Meet Up Magnolia- virtual networking
item.description:
Thursday, May 14, 2026 at 9:30 AM

Location: https://us02web.zoom.us/j/85388228818?pwd=amdmUEMvcVo2YjhETkxkbGJCa1Q4Zz09

Our member businesses know the value of networking. Join us for our virtual networking event\, Meet Up Magnolia\, on the  2nd Thursday of every month. \nHow does this virtual networking work? You simply log on to the Zoom link and will be paired into one-on-one chats for 8 to 10 minutes each. We will repeat the process for approximately 3 or 4 rounds. You even have the option to follow up after the meeting and send a message to one or more of the people you meet to keep the dialogue going. \nSo many people to meet\, so many professional relationships to build. Join us HERE.

From Discover Magnolia

item.description:
Saturday, June 6, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Metro Dog\, 4020 23rd Ave W\, Seattle\, WA\, 98119\, United States

Classes are intended for pet care professionals\, dog and cat owners\, rescue workers\, first responders\, groomers and shelter workers. Course completion offers continuing education credits for PSI\, IAABC\, IACP and CBCC-KA members. This class has received the Animal Wellness Magazine Stamp of Approval and a Modern Dog Fave Find. We work with live animals in class.

Sunday, June 7, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Metro Dog\, 4020 23rd Ave W\, Seattle\, WA\, 98119\, United States

Join us for a day of the most comprehensive pet first aid course available! Our Walks ‘n’ Wags certified instructors offer a day of fun and learning. Classes are intended for pet care professionals\, dog and cat owners\, rescue workers\, first responders\, groomers and shelter workers. Course completion offers continuing education credits for PSI\, IAABC\, IACP and CBCC-KA members. This class has received the Animal Wellness Magazine Stamp of Approval and a Modern Dog Fave Find. Event details

item.title: Business & Breakfast
item.description:
Tuesday, June 9, 2026 at 8:30 AM

Location: Aegis Living at Rodgers Park\, 2900 3rd Ave W\, Seattle\, WA\, 98119\, United States

Our Business & Breakfast series brings local professionals together for meaningful networking\, practical business education\, and great conversation. Each session features a guest speaker or facilitator offering tools you can use right away—whether you’re growing your business\, strengthening your team\, or expanding your local connections. Join us\, enjoy a chef-prepared breakfast\, and start your morning with inspiration and community.

From Discover Magnolia

Event details
